requirement_source: PRD Blcvui4UIn (PRD: orvex-studio-billing, canonical post-ENG-2036) + Architecture o2ZqSrZjE6 (A-XXX ADR-style rulings)

epics.title: [EPIC] billing: plan catalog, pricing data & Stripe object model

stories.title: [billing] Versioned plan catalog schema + GET /v1/plans public read (enterprise excluded server-side)
[billing] Stripe Product/Price scheme with versioned lookup_keys + startup/CI mode-resolution assertion
[billing] VAT-inclusive GBP-only pricing display + automatic_tax + annual '2 months free' metadata
[billing] Teams interest capture POST /v1/plans/teams/interest + admin interest-list export

epics.title: [EPIC] billing: the entitlement record & the one check primitive

stories.title: [billing] Append-only entitlement_versions schema + current projection + polymorphic principal (migration 001)
[billing] GET /v1/entitlements/{principal_type}/{principal_id} check primitive + Redis event-evicted cache
[billing] lib/entitlements client + fail-consistent semantics + contracts conformance fixtures (Go + engine TS client)
[billing] Gated-feature-key enum + act-as-user delegation resolution + per-capability API gate tests

epics.title: [EPIC] billing: cap/quota policy registry & entitlement-change propagation

stories.title: [billing] cap_policies registry per plan-version (two AI cap lines + curator/trial/demo caps)
[billing] Wiki quota values in the catalog (Free locked, Personal pending-freeze) served in caps{}
[billing] billing.entitlement.changed publish + Redis cache evict + reconcile canonical-record path
[billing] Synchronous cap push to ai (workload-identity PUT cap endpoint) — two sibling cap lines
[billing] Paywall-dissolve UI push <60s both products (BFF SSE + engine cache-evict semantics)

epics.title: [EPIC] billing: the Stripe money path — checkout, portal, webhook & flips

stories.title: [billing] POST /v1/checkout — Stripe Checkout session, server-set metadata.principal, purchase authz
[billing] POST /v1/portal — Customer Portal session + config-as-code proration policy
[billing] Webhook receiver pipeline: verify → journal-raw → idempotency ledger → authoritative re-fetch → apply
[billing] Global-tier thin Stripe forwarder + home-cell routing via control-plane registry (A-CELL-ROUTING)
[billing] Flip semantics — one entitlement version per lifecycle transition + GET /v1/billing-state
[billing] Test-clock money-path E2E CI gate (monthly+annual+dunning+cancel+re-subscribe+retro fixture), red-blocking

epics.title: [EPIC] billing: the trial state machine & retroactive backfill

stories.title: [billing] No-card trial temporary entitlement grant + trial_grants email-HMAC dedupe
[billing] Trial lifecycle step APIs (trial-start / trial-expire) + expiry-flip = lapse semantics
[billing] Trial fair-use throttle (100/wk advisory → 150) computed from Redis counters, surfaced in check
[billing] Retroactive trial backfill step (backfill-batch, idempotent, resumable, cohort count)

epics.title: [EPIC] billing: metering ingestion, usage journal & reconciliation

stories.title: [billing] cmd/metering worker consumes ai.usage.recorded → Postgres journal append table + Redis counters
[billing] Cost-center = call-site × principal + report-only ai.cap.* journaling
[billing] GET /v1/usage/{principal_type}/{principal_id} reporting surface
[billing] Reconciliation schedules — subscription sweep, cap re-assert, journal checksum + drift alerts

epics.title: [EPIC] billing: auth, admin, workflow step APIs & GDPR

stories.title: [billing] Edge auth + three route classes + tenant-scoped reads + console-fronted admin mutations
[billing] Workflow step-API surface — WorkloadIdentityOnly + idempotency + typed retryable/terminal envelope
[billing] GDPR purge step — cancel sub, delete Stripe Customer, pseudonymize journal + entitlement history
[billing] Entitlement-decision audit append table + admin/destructive audit stream

epics.title: [EPIC] billing: persistence, event spine, cell-contract & observability platform

stories.title: [billing] Persistence split — Postgres tables + Redis, no Mongo, purge-safe cache keys
[billing] Events published/consumed on studio-spine (CloudEvents, orvexcell fail-closed extension)
[billing] Cell-contract compliance — healthz CELL_ID+CLUSTER_NAME, 421 guard, tenant-move step class + TENANT_MOVE.md
[billing] Observability & SLIs — OTel/Prometheus flip-lag, check-latency, cache-hit, journal + webhook SLIs, Alertmanager
[billing] NFR conformance harness — latency, flip-lag, idempotency, fail-consistency, money-correctness, security, privacy
